title: Electrical and Electronics Engineering (English) Program Educational Objectives
content:
Electrical and Electronics Engineering (English) Program Educational Objectives

Program Educational Objectives

1. To educate engineers with strong theoretical and practical knowledge in electronics, computing, and communication engineering.

2. To educate graduates who can compete at an international level, and who can follow current technologies and developments in their field.

3. To educate engineers who adhere to professional ethics and possess human and societal values.

4. To educate research-oriented engineers with strong analytical thinking, problem-solving, and modeling skills.

5. To educate graduates who can develop sustainable, innovative, and creative solutions to engineering problems.

6. To educate individuals with a strong awareness of lifelong learning, who continuously update their knowledge and skills.
